hero.eyebrow: Yangjae Flagship · The Room Euljiro · Dongdaemun
hero.sub: Yukjeup Gwaliso offers Korean premium dining that is formal yet never stiff — from business dinners to intimate evenings. Naturally raised black pork from Sancheong and white pork from Geochang, 100% bamboo charcoal, tableside grilling service, and a smoke-free space — every moment designed by a founder with a background in fashion.

footer.disclaimer: Menu items and prices may vary by location.
footer.originLine: Sancheong Black Pork · Geochang White Pork · 100% Bamboo Charcoal
